content: Self-Refine's iterative single-perspective refinement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement loop that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision while resolving its common limitation of getting stuck in local optima from single-perspective feedback. This hybrid approach would let LLMs catch flaws in their outputs that homogeneous self-feedback would miss, all without relying on external data or human labels.
